test_cases.name: create_author_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify that a new author can be created with valid data

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_required_field
test_cases.description: Verify that creating an author without required 'name' field returns validation error

test_cases.name: get_existing_author
test_cases.description: Verify that an existing author can be retrieved

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verify that requesting a non-existent author returns 404

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_not_modified
test_cases.description: Verify that conditional GET with matching ETag returns 304 Not Modified

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify that an author can be updated with valid data

test_cases.name: update_author_with_stale_etag
test_cases.description: Verify that updating an author with stale ETag returns 412 Precondition Failed

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verify that an author without associated books can be deleted

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Verify that deleting an author with associated books returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_category_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify that a new category can be created with valid data

test_cases.name: create_duplicate_category
test_cases.description: Verify that creating a category with duplicate name returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_book_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify that a new book can be created with valid data

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verify that creating a book with duplicate ISBN returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_price
test_cases.description: Verify that creating a book with negative price returns validation error

test_cases.name: get_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verify that an existing book can be retrieved

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify that requesting a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone

test_cases.name: soft_delete_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verify that a book can be soft-deleted

test_cases.name: delete_already_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify that deleting an already soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify that a soft-deleted book can be restored

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify that restoring a non-deleted book returns 400 Bad Request

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book
test_cases.description: Verify that discount can be applied to a book published more than 1 year ago

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Verify that discount cannot be applied to a book published less than 1 year ago

test_cases.name: discount_rate_limit_exceeded
test_cases.description: Verify that exceeding discount rate limit returns 429 Too Many Requests

test_cases.name: increase_book_stock
test_cases.description: Verify that book stock can be increased

test_cases.name: decrease_stock_below_zero
test_cases.description: Verify that decreasing stock below zero returns 400 Bad Request

test_cases.name: upload_valid_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verify that a valid cover image can be uploaded

test_cases.name: upload_unsupported_file_type
test_cases.description: Verify that uploading an unsupported file type returns 415 Unsupported Media Type

test_cases.name: upload_file_too_large
test_cases.description: Verify that uploading a file larger than 2MB returns 413 Content Too Large

test_cases.name: create_review_for_book
test_cases.description: Verify that a review can be created for a book

test_cases.name: create_review_for_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify that creating a review for a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone
